proposals.title: File duplication in code generation output
proposals.lesson: Code generation produced duplicate files: **Critical Issues Found:** 3 duplicated `ExamReadinessViewModel` definitions create runtime ambiguity and crash risk. **High-Priority Issues:** 3 dupl. Extraction pipeline needs deduplication.
proposals.reason: Recurring failure patterns should be captured to prevent repetition in future projects.

proposals.title: SwiftUI lifecycle pattern: Unhandled Task Cancellation in refreshReadiness()
proposals.lesson: Generated SwiftUI code missing lifecycle management: Unhandled Task Cancellation in refreshReadiness()
proposals.reason: Technical patterns detected in reviews can be reused across projects.
